touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Hannah Martin introducing our call recording and coaching platform. No response received.
Attempted cold call to Hannah Martin. Left voicemail introducing solution for healthcare customer success teams. No callback.
LinkedIn message sent highlighting ROI for CS teams in healthcare IT. No response.
Second cold call attempt. Hannah unavailable, left message with assistant. No callback.
Follow-up email with case study from similar healthcare IT company. No response received.
Third call attempt reached Hannah. Brief conversation, she expressed interest in learning more and scheduled qualification call.

Qualification call with Hannah Martin. She's new to VP of CS role (3 months) and looking to standardize coaching across 9-person team. Currently using basic screen recording tools. Interested in call analytics and automated coaching workflows. Mentioned tight budget constraints but sees value. Scheduled technical eval.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for coaching your customer success team?
questions_asked.answer: We're mostly doing ad-hoc call reviews using basic screen recording. No consistent framework, and I'm trying to bring more structure since I joined.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with the current approach?
questions_asked.answer: It's incredibly time-consuming, and there's no visibility into what's happening across all our calls. I can't scale myself to coach everyone effectively.

questions_asked.question: How does the unlimited automation tier work exactly?
questions_asked.answer: You get automated call scoring, sentiment analysis, and coaching recommendations for unlimited calls. Perfect for a team your size.

objections: Budget is really tight this quarter since I'm also hiring two new CS reps
next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Hannah's team

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with additional resources on coaching frameworks. No response needed.
Follow-up email confirming technical eval details. Hannah responded confirming time and asking to include two team leads.

questions_asked.question: Can we include two of my senior CS reps in the technical eval?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, that would be great. I'll send calendar invites to all three of you.

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message sharing article on CS coaching best practices. No response.

Technical evaluation with Hannah and two CS team leads. Walked through call recording setup, automated scoring models, and coaching dashboard. Team was impressed with HIPAA compliance features and ease of use. Hannah asked about implementation timeline and whether we offer training. Mentioned needing to get COO Chris Campbell's approval before moving forward due to price point.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks from contract signing. We handle all the technical setup and provide onboarding training for your team.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision-making process for a purchase like this?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority up to $5K annually, but this would need Chris Campbell's sign-off since it's above that. He's pretty involved in our operational decisions.

questions_asked.question: Do you provide ongoing training and support?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, unlimited support is included, plus quarterly training sessions on new features and best practices.

objections: The price point is a bit higher than I was hoping for my initial budget
next_steps: Hannah will present to Chris Campbell
Schedule exec meeting with Chris if needed

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message from Hannah thanking for the demo and confirming she's setting up time with Chris. Positive signal.

Follow-up email with formal proposal at list price. Hannah responded asking if there's any flexibility on pricing given they're a smaller team just getting started. Indicated Chris is concerned about the upfront cost.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing? Chris is concerned about the investment given we're still building out the CS function.
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what I can do. Would a reduced first-year rate help get this approved? I want to make sure this works for your budget.

next_steps: Discuss discount options with sales leadership
Schedule call with Chris Campbell to address concerns

touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt, no answer. Left voicemail following up on proposal discussion.

Executive meeting with COO Chris Campbell and Hannah Martin. Chris focused heavily on ROI and payback period. Discussed reducing customer churn through better CS coaching. Presented revised pricing with 38% discount to fit their budget constraints. Chris appreciated the flexibility but wants to see quarterly performance metrics built into the contract. He's cautious about the commitment but Hannah championed the value. Agreement to move forward with discounted rate and quarterly check-ins.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI have other healthcare IT companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Our healthcare customers typically see 15-20% improvement in customer satisfaction scores within the first quarter, and several have reduced churn by 10-15% within six months.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear win for you in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: If Hannah's team can demonstrate measurable improvement in call quality and we see our NPS tick up, that would justify the investment.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure this with a quarterly review to ensure we're seeing the value?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. We can build in formal QBRs to track your KPIs and make sure you're getting the outcomes you need.

objections: The commitment level is significant for a team our size and stage
next_steps: Send revised contract with 38% discount and quarterly review terms
Target contract signature within one week

touches.ai_summary: Cold call follow-up after exec meeting. No answer, left voicemail.
